data.summary: TEST: S1-CORE-TEST — 10 simulated runs, 1 CRITICAL bug found (double cards_played), 10/11 invariants PASS
DEV: Fixed CRITICAL double increment cards_played in resolve_card() line 483
TEST: Re-verified 11/11 invariants PASS after bugfix. cards_played now accurate.
DEV: Removed orphaned process_card(), extracted pacing recovery into StoreRun.resolve_choice()
DEV: Removed dead code from merlin_constants.gd (ELEMENTS, ESSENCE_*, FLUX_*)
DEV: Cleaned merlin_store.gd dead state (essence, bestiole, ogham_fragments)
DEV: Renamed TRIADE_ prefixes to clean dispatch actions
DEV: Aligned 18 Oghams on bible v2.4 (7 effects corrected)
TEST: LLM validation — 10 cards generated, JSON structure OK, fallback tested
DEV: Sprint 1 COMPLETE. All S1 tasks verified done. Removed dead GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS.
TEST: S2-INTEGRATION — 12 systems audited. 1 HIGH (promise dual storage), 4 MEDIUM, 2 LOW.
DEV: Fixed HIGH promise split-brain. Unified to active_promises, card-based deadlines.
TEST: 8 edge cases simulated, 7/8 PASS. Found BUG-MIDRUN-SAVE + BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA.
DEV: Fixed mid-run save. Removed pacing recovery per director q-005.
TEST: LLM robustness — 1 HIGH (factions stale), 2 LOW. Transport layer fully robust.
DEV: ACTION_VERBS neutre field separated, FIELD_MINIGAMES[neutre] added, drain_per_card fixed 1->0, dominant_faction added to 8 BIOMES (q-20260413-002 applied)
TEST: S4-SMOKE-TEST static analysis — 13 invariants PASS, 5/5 regressions PASS, 0 new bugs. 2 open (BUG-FACTIONS-STALE P5, BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA P6). PAT-023+024 added.
DEV: Fixed 6 stale run.factions reads across rag_manager(4)+llm_adapter(2). Injected dominant_faction into enriched_run. S2-CLEAN-CARDSYS confirmed pre-completed.

TEST: S3-FACTION-REGRESSION-TEST — 7/7 checks PASS, 5/5 regressions PASS. BUG-FACTIONS-STALE-FIX fully verified. Zero stale run.factions reads across all 5 AI subsystems. dominant_faction routing wired. 0 new bugs.

DEV: S2-CONTEXT-GAUGES-CLEANUP — Removed dead gauges key from build_full_context() + deleted get_critical_gauges(). Cleaned 9 dead test functions. Applied q-20260413-003: S3-AMBIENT+S3-PIXEL cancelled, DIR-S2-MNWXQ41M promoted P22->P14. Created S2-DAY-TICK-FIX(P8)+S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST(P9)+S3-MINIGAMES-FIELD-AUDIT(P10). PAT-026 added.

TEST: S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST — PARTIAL_PASS. 6/8 checks PASS (no gauges key, get_critical_gauges removed, faction_rep routed, active_promises unified, drain=0, no pacing recovery). 2/8 FAIL_PENDING: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX (P6) + S2-DAY-TICK-FIX (P8) not yet applied. 5/5 regressions PASS. 0 new bugs. Created S2-DAY-SIGNAL-REGRESSION-TEST P11.

DEV: S2-DEAD-FILES — 4/5 bestiole files pre-deleted. Deleted mg_de_du_destin.gd (D20 suppressed). Fixed 3 refs in minigame_registry.gd (GAMES[], match case, fallback→mg_pile_ou_face). Fixed 1 ref in auto_play_runner.gd (MINIGAME_LIST 15→14). 0 refs remain outside archive. PAT-028 added.

TEST: S3-MINIGAMES-FIELD-AUDIT — PARTIAL_PASS. CHECK-1 PASS: FIELD_MINIGAMES=bible s.6.2 exact. CHECK-2 PASS: all 23 mg_ scripts exist, no scenes needed. CHECK-3 PASS: no orphaned scripts. BUG HIGH: mg_sang_froid in GAMES[vigueur] should be GAMES[esprit]. Created BUG-SANG-FROID-GAMES-FIELD(P5)+S3-MINIGAME-ROUTING-REGRESSION(P13). PAT-029 added (dual minigame mapping systems). q-20260413-004 generated (meditation placement).

DEV: BUG-SANG-FROID-GAMES-FIELD — Fixed GAMES dict: mg_sang_froid moved vigueur->esprit (bible s.6.2). GAMES[esprit]=[volonte,apaisement,sang_froid], GAMES[vigueur]=[combat_rituel,course]. mg_meditation removed from dispatch (script preserved, q-20260413-004 pending). Deleted mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid orphan. PAT-030 added. 10 pending tasks remain.

TEST: S3-MINIGAME-ROUTING-REGRESSION — PASS 6/6. BUG-SANG-FROID fix verified: mg_sang_froid in GAMES[esprit], not vigueur. FIELD_MINIGAMES aligned. 22+1 scripts exist. mg_de_du_destin fully deleted. mg_meditation preserved pending q-20260413-004. 2 LOW notes (dead preload, cosmetic comment). 0 new bugs. Created S2-ANAM-VERIFY(P9)+S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP(P12)+S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT(P19). 12 pending tasks. MERGE: reintegrated 40+ commits from detached HEAD into main.

DEV: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX — Fixed reputation_changed signal in merlin_store.gd: capture old_rep BEFORE _apply_faction_reputation(), compute actual_delta=new_val-old_rep, emit actual_delta not raw rep_delta. Verified: faction_rep=95+delta=+20 emits +5 (not +20). Also archived S3-MINIGAME-ROUTING-REGRESSION (already completed). PAT-031 added. 11 pending tasks remain.

TEST: S2-DAY-SIGNAL-REGRESSION-TEST — PARTIAL_PASS 6/9. CHECK-1 PASS: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX verified (actual_delta=+5 not +20 at rep=95). 5/5 regressions PASS. 3 FAIL_PENDING blocked on S2-DAY-TICK-FIX (P8): CARDS_PER_DAY missing, run.day frozen at 1. Applied q-20260413-004: S3-MEDITATION-CLEANUP unblocked (option A: delete mg_meditation). PAT-032 added. 10 pending tasks.
